code: import React from"react";import{Circle}from"react-leaflet";import{jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";const NIGHT_RADIUS_METERS=10007500;function toRadians(degrees){return degrees*Math.PI/180;}function toDegrees(radians){return radians*180/Math.PI;}function normalizeLongitude(longitude){let value=longitude;while(value>180){value-=360;}while(value<-180){value+=360;}return value;}function getSubsolarPoint(date){const julianDate=date.getTime()/86400000+2440587.5;const centuries=(julianDate-2451545.0)/36525.0;const meanLongitude=(280.46646+centuries*(36000.76983+centuries*0.0003032))%360;const meanAnomaly=357.52911+centuries*(35999.05029-0.0001537*centuries);const equationOfCenter=Math.sin(toRadians(meanAnomaly))*(1.914602-centuries*(0.004817+0.000014*centuries))+Math.sin(toRadians(2*meanAnomaly))*(0.019993-0.000101*centuries)+Math.sin(toRadians(3*meanAnomaly))*0.000289;const trueLongitude=meanLongitude+equationOfCenter;const obliquity=23.439291-0.0130042*centuries;const lambdaRad=toRadians(trueLongitude);const obliquityRad=toRadians(obliquity);const declination=Math.asin(Math.sin(obliquityRad)*Math.sin(lambdaRad));const rightAscension=Math.atan2(Math.cos(obliquityRad)*Math.sin(lambdaRad),Math.cos(lambdaRad));const gmst=280.46061837+360.98564736629*(julianDate-2451545.0)+centuries*centuries*(0.000387933-centuries/38710000);const subsolarLongitude=normalizeLongitude(toDegrees(rightAscension)-gmst);return{latitude:toDegrees(declination),longitude:subsolarLongitude};}export default function DayNightOverlay(){const subsolar=getSubsolarPoint(new Date());const nightCenter=[-subsolar.latitude,normalizeLongitude(subsolar.longitude+180)];return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Circle,{center:nightCenter,radius:NIGHT_RADIUS_METERS,pathOptions:{color:"#020617",fillColor:"#020617",fillOpacity:0.24,weight:0}});}
